{{Quote|If my duties demand that I die, then so be it, my pet. My domain will prosper. My father will be escalated to the rank of mosthigh priest.|Elan, to Vergere|<ref name="Hero's Trial" />}}
'''Mosthigh priest''' was a high-ranking title within the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[priest caste]]. When the Yuuzhan Vong [[Priestess/Legends|Priestess]] [[Elan]] was tasked with a mission to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] many leading [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] of the [[New Jedi Order]]<ref name="Hero's Trial" /> in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' to [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].</ref> she believed the successful completion of her assignment would result in the escalation of her [[Parent/Legends|father]], [[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] [[Jakan]], to the rank of mosthigh priest. Following an [[Raid on Wayland (25 ABY)|attempt]] on Elan's life by a [[Unidentified Yuuzhan Vong assassin (Wayland)|Yuuzhan Vong assassin]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]], she assured her [[familiar]] [[Vergere]] that she accepted she might [[Death/Legends|die]] in the course of her mission because her father would be promoted and [[Unidentified domain|their domain]] would prosper.<ref name="Hero's Trial" />

Although Elan failed to assassinate the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] before her death during the [[Battle of Bilbringi (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Bilbringi]],<ref name="Hero's Trial" /> her father went on to greater power and influence.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|135|Jakan}}</ref> Nonetheless, Jakan retained the title of High Priest throughout the entirety of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="The Unifying Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The rank of mosthigh priest was first mentioned in the [[2000]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'', written by [[James Luceno]].<ref name="Hero's Trial" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1stm}}
